对称.mechanism: Delete fake directional freedom by testing whether interchange leaves the live law unchanged.
对称.controller_question: What a对称 is real, and what a对称 is only coordinate costume?
wake_when: Two sides, roles, or branches look comparable
The target punishes imbalance or drift
A swap test could kill fake distinctions cheaply
对称.cheapest_honest_touch: Try one lawful swap or balancing normalization and see what burden survives.
对称.anti_pattern: Do not call something symmetric just because it looks visually balanced.

极限边界.mechanism: Squeeze slack out of the system until the hidden rule-change seam becomes visible.
极限边界.controller_question: Which boundary, degenerate case, or first crack exposes the controlling law earliest?
wake_when: The object still feels too thick
A denominator, support, or degree of freedom is causing fog
Edge behavior should preserve the same controller more honestly
极限边界.cheapest_honest_touch: Push one variable to zero, coincidence, tangency, or saturation and inspect what remains rigid.
极限边界.anti_pattern: Do not force a boundary that changes the problem rather than revealing it.

守恒.mechanism: Rewrite visible motion or clutter as one conserved ledger, net flow, or invariant aggregate.
守恒.controller_question: What total, balance, or invariant still owns truth while the local story moves around?
wake_when: Things seem to appear, disappear, or circulate
Local motion obscures a stable total
Validation depends on what can lawfully survive after transformation
守恒.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one total account and check whether every local change pays into it consistently.
守恒.anti_pattern: Do not call a vibe '守恒' unless you can say what is actually conserved.

投影.mechanism: Read a thick object through a thinner lawful shadow that still preserves the hinge.
投影.controller_question: What smaller carrier, section, or shadow still determines the target exactly?
wake_when: The object has more dimensions than the answer seems to need
Only one 读出, slice, or direction seems load-bearing
A global object could be replaced by an interface quantity
投影.cheapest_honest_touch: Project onto one axis, section, or interface value and test whether exact closure survives there.
投影.anti_pattern: Do not project away a coordinate that still owns legality or reconstruction.

赋值.mechanism: Probe a route with one controlled value choice that pressures the live mechanism cheaply.
赋值.controller_question: Which representative value or anchor exposes the route fastest without changing the law?
wake_when: A general symbolic story is too loose
One special point could separate rival explanations cheaply
A parameter still hides the center of the problem
赋值.cheapest_honest_touch: Plug one anchor value, coincidence, or named representative and see what law becomes rigid.
赋值.anti_pattern: Do not treat random plugging as 赋值; the chosen value must be mechanism-revealing.

反向.mechanism: Flip direction when the no-return law or legality owner is clearer from the finished side.
反向.controller_question: Does the controller become thinner if the process is read backward rather than forward?
wake_when: Forward narration keeps too many fake freedoms alive
A no-return law is visible only after reversal
Construction is thicker than legality
反向.cheapest_honest_touch: Rewrite one step from output back to source and inspect what freedom dies immediately.
反向.anti_pattern: Do not 反向 just to look clever; 反向 only when it preserves the same controller more honestly.

图像.mechanism: Externalize a relation into a graph, diagram, corridor, or shape so illegal coexistence becomes visible.
图像.controller_question: Is the burden really spatial, relational, or flow-like rather than verbal?
wake_when: Adjacency or interaction is hard to hold verbally
Local legality may fail globally through crossings or collisions
A graph or shape could kill fake possibilities early
图像.cheapest_honest_touch: Draw one minimal object whose forbidden adjacencies or crossings are easier to see than to narrate.
图像.anti_pattern: Do not promote a 图像 to truth unless it cashes back into the exact target.

见证.mechanism: Use one hostile or separating case to kill fake lines early.
见证.controller_question: What is the cheapest concrete 见证 that splits the live candidates?
wake_when: Several routes still look plausible
Confidence is being carried by atmosphere rather than evidence
One seam can be touched directly
见证.cheapest_honest_touch: Construct one case, check, or counter-pressure that one route survives and another fails.
见证.anti_pattern: Do not keep broad explanation alive when one local 见证 could already decide.

状态拆分.mechanism: Compress a noisy process into the smallest exact state, quotient, or 相容 residue.
状态拆分.controller_question: What residue still decides legality, mergeability, or reconstruction after thinning?
wake_when: A history-shaped object still owns the burden
A local checker wants to become a global state object
The run still says 'then do DP' without exact state shape
状态拆分.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the smallest state coordinates that still decide the next legality or 读出 step.
状态拆分.anti_pattern: Do not compress for style; keep every coordinate that still owns truth.

相容.mechanism: Turn many locally legal pieces into one exact coexistence or merge object.
相容.controller_question: What hidden supply, overlap, or residue decides whether local choices can coexist globally?
wake_when: Many local 见证es look legal at once
The burden is web-shaped rather than corridor-shaped
The last missing object is a merge or coexistence rule
相容.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one 相容 carrier or merge law that can reject impossible local combinations.
相容.anti_pattern: Do not confuse local legality with joint realizability.

读出.mechanism: Force the current carrier to cash into the exact asked-medium 读出 rather than a nearby elegant surrogate.
读出.controller_question: What exact answer-side object, field, or certificate is still missing?
wake_when: The run sounds right but the final interface is still unnamed
A beautiful middle object is replacing exact closure
The asked medium is still untouched or cosmetic only
读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one explicit answer/读出 dependency, field set, or certificate surface.
读出.anti_pattern: Do not stop at 'then combine' or 'then query'.

向量差读出.mechanism: Read the target through one difference vector or displacement ledger rather than a full object family.
向量差读出.controller_question: Is the answer owned by one difference or displacement 读出 rather than by the full ambient object?
wake_when: Relative movement matters more than absolute placement
A pairwise gap seems more stable than the whole story
向量差读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the target directly in terms of one displacement or difference vector.
向量差读出.anti_pattern: Do not keep full coordinate baggage if only relative differences matter.

公共值压缩.mechanism: Collapse many apparent parameters into one latent shared controller.
公共值压缩.controller_question: What single common value or latent quantity can replace many decorative local values?
wake_when: Several values are moving together under one hidden law
The same burden is repeated under different labels
公共值压缩.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one shared latent value and test whether the rest becomes bookkeeping.
公共值压缩.anti_pattern: Do not rename many distinct owners as one value if they still carry different constraints.

容器到截面.mechanism: Replace a container story with the decisive section that actually controls it.
容器到截面.controller_question: Which cross-section or slice still carries the whole burden?
wake_when: A volume, region, or container feels heavier than the answer needs
One section seems to control feasibility or measure
容器到截面.cheapest_honest_touch: Cut one section and test whether the controller survives there exactly.
容器到截面.anti_pattern: Do not keep the whole container if only one section owns the truth.

面积到线读出.mechanism: Read an area-like quantity through one line, gap, or support measure.
面积到线读出.controller_question: Is the spread really controlled by one line-level 读出?
wake_when: A region's measure depends mostly on one gap or height
The object looks two-dimensional but the burden feels one-dimensional
面积到线读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Rewrite the area or spread through one line-controlled quantity.
面积到线读出.anti_pattern: Do not keep a full surface model when one gap or support already closes it.

匹配替代概率.mechanism: Replace fuzzy probabilistic narration with an exact pairing or matching object.
匹配替代概率.controller_question: Is this really a counting/matching problem disguised as probability talk?
wake_when: Randomness talk hides discrete structure
The real burden is allocation or pairing
匹配替代概率.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one exact pairing or matching surrogate and compare what it preserves.
匹配替代概率.anti_pattern: Do not stay in expectation/probability language if exact combinatorics is thinner.

格点选排.mechanism: Collapse a grid or arrangement burden into one selection/permutation invariant.
格点选排.controller_question: Is the real controller one order/selection law rather than the whole grid?
wake_when: A matrix or grid is present but only ordering seems load-bearing
A placement problem smells like a permutation constraint
格点选排.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the burden as one order-selection object and test whether geometry drops out.
格点选排.anti_pattern: Do not keep full grid detail if the legal structure is just ordering.

不算而比.mechanism: Separate routes by order, sign, or threshold without paying full computation cost.
不算而比.controller_question: Can one comparison decide the issue before full evaluation?
wake_when: You only need which side wins
An exact number is less important than order or sign
不算而比.cheapest_honest_touch: Ask one inequality, sign, or threshold-side question that the true route must answer.
不算而比.anti_pattern: Do not compute a full expression if one order comparison already decides the route.

点积投影.mechanism: Use 投影 along one direction to turn geometry into scalar control.
点积投影.controller_question: Which directional 读出 makes the object linear enough to read honestly?
wake_when: Direction matters more than full coordinates
A 投影 can expose the controlling range
点积投影.cheapest_honest_touch: Project onto the controlling direction and inspect the scalar residue.
点积投影.anti_pattern: Do not keep rotational clutter if one 投影 already owns the answer.

规范归一化.mechanism: Rewrite to a mother form whose laws are easier to inherit directly.
规范归一化.controller_question: What lawful normalization kills decorative variation without losing control?
wake_when: Equivalent forms are obscuring one shared law
A change of form can shrink the legal search space
规范归一化.cheapest_honest_touch: Normalize one representative and check whether the burden becomes family-level rather than instance-level.
规范归一化.anti_pattern: Do not normalize away a coordinate that still owns legality.

投影读出.mechanism: Use a projected quantity as the final 读出 rather than merely as an intermediate view.
投影读出.controller_question: Can the target be answered directly on the projected carrier?
wake_when: A 投影 already preserves the asked interface
The current carrier is nearly speakable after 投影
投影读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the exact 读出 directly on the projected carrier.
投影读出.anti_pattern: Do not project and then rebuild the full object by habit.

主导机制读出.mechanism: Read the outcome through the mechanism that actually dominates survival at the asked interface.
主导机制读出.controller_question: Which mechanism still has the last real discretion over the observed result?
wake_when: Several mechanisms are locally real but one likely dominates
A broad story exists but the final authorizing layer is still unclear
主导机制读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one 读出 that isolates the dominant surviving mechanism rather than the first visible one.
主导机制读出.anti_pattern: Do not stop at the first true local mechanism if a later ceiling still decides the result.

局部缝控制整体.mechanism: Use one local rule-change seam to control a wider global outcome.
局部缝控制整体.controller_question: Is there one local seam whose law propagates farther than the surface story suggests?
wake_when: A global burden seems to hinge on one local break
A cheapest seam may separate whole route families
局部缝控制整体.cheapest_honest_touch: Probe the seam and ask what global structure must follow if it holds there.
局部缝控制整体.anti_pattern: Do not jump to global narrative before testing whether one seam actually controls it.

定义即直接读出.mechanism: Use the exact definition itself as the 读出 surface instead of inventing extra machinery.
定义即直接读出.controller_question: Does the answer already sit inside the exact object the definition names?
wake_when: A concept is already defined by the needed quantity
Extra derivation is adding shell rather than closure
定义即直接读出.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the answer directly through the exact defining relation.
定义即直接读出.anti_pattern: Do not build a second theory when the definition already exposes the 读出.

对称消元.mechanism: Use 对称 not just as atmosphere but to eliminate explicit variables or branches.
对称消元.controller_question: Which degree of freedom becomes illegal or redundant after lawful 对称 identification?
wake_when: A variable survives only because equivalent roles were never quotiented
Symmetry could collapse an explicit scan
对称消元.cheapest_honest_touch: Identify the variable that dies once the symmetric roles are treated as one class.
对称消元.anti_pattern: Do not claim variable death until the 对称 preserves all active constraints.

边界找路.mechanism: Use the boundary not just as a check but as the route-finding surface itself.
边界找路.controller_question: What route only becomes visible once the object is pushed to its edge or first crack?
wake_when: Interior continuation is too foggy
The boundary preserves the same controller more sharply than the middle
边界找路.cheapest_honest_touch: Push directly to the edge case and read the route there before regrowing the interior.
边界找路.anti_pattern: Do not treat the boundary as optional decoration when it is the real route finder.

先调模型后推导.mechanism: Call the likely object family or law before paying full derivation, then verify cheaply.
先调模型后推导.controller_question: What lawful family should be tested as a serious candidate before brute continuation?
wake_when: A familiar structural family is strongly suggested
Testing a family hypothesis is cheaper than deriving blindly
先调模型后推导.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one candidate family and hit it with one cheap falsification check.
先调模型后推导.anti_pattern: Do not let family recognition replace verification.

特殊值探针.mechanism: Use one strategically chosen value to reveal the controller or kill a fake route.
特殊值探针.controller_question: Which special value sharpens the mechanism rather than merely simplifying arithmetic?
wake_when: A general route is too broad
One value can expose the anchor, 对称, or failure seam
特殊值探针.cheapest_honest_touch: Probe the one value most likely to expose the live controller.
特殊值探针.anti_pattern: Do not confuse simplification values with mechanism-revealing values.

函数原型匹配.mechanism: Match the current object to a function/archetype family whose laws shrink the search space immediately.
函数原型匹配.controller_question: Which archetype does this object already belong to if I stop narrating its costume?
wake_when: The object looks custom but behaves like a known family
Family laws can kill many fake freedoms at once
函数原型匹配.cheapest_honest_touch: State the archetype and test one law that should hold if the match is real.
函数原型匹配.anti_pattern: Do not force a family match that only shares surface resemblance.
